long_form.title: The Rise and Fall of Airline Hijackings: A Global History (1960-2023)
long_form.description: Explore the full global history of airline hijackings from 1960 to 2023. This data visualization reveals how this terrifying trend emerged, surged dramatically during periods of global conflict and political unrest, and then significantly declined due to enhanced security measures. We also highlight a critical segment from 1989 to 2001, where fatalities from hijackings tragically increased by 26700%. Data: Our World in Data.

short.title: Airline Hijacking Fatalities Exploded 26700% (1989-2001) #Shorts
short.description: Witness the shocking 26700% surge in airline hijacking fatalities between 1989 and 2001. This short video highlights the most extreme period in the history of airline hijackings, revealing a terrifying escalation.
